noTouch: gateway runtime behavior beyond local script orchestration

checks.browser: skip: local CLI script/test harness slice; browser UI not in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because the slice is limited to root npm script orchestration and a package-script regression test; it avoids service behavior changes, real network calls, deployments, sponsor keys, and private prototype files
knownFailures: Manual clean-dist red proof command was blocked by operator approval; regression test red state was verified instead.
notes: Ensures npm run smoke:local builds workspace package dist outputs before running the local gateway smoke, so the documented one-command smoke path is safer from a clean checkout or after ignored dist artifacts are missing.
